plunger.description: Pulls the ball toward the bot — best aimed at goal.

grappling_hook.description: Launches bot through the air toward ball/opponent.

freezer.description: Freezes ball in place — use to stall enemy attack.

haymaker.description: Powerful spring that launches the ball at high speed.

spikes.description: Attaches ball to car — drive it into the goal.

punch.description: Punches opponents/ball away — use to clear defenders.

tornado.description: Tornado that disrupts ball path and opponent position.

batarang.description: Boomerang that travels to target and returns.

magnet.description: Temporarily magnetises ball toward the car.

ball_lasso.description: Lasso that grabs and controls ball trajectory.

spike.description: Attaches spikes to car — ram opponents or carry ball.
